goals: Search for existing memories about constituent preferences or past community interactions
Store important information about a community issue or constituent preference
Verify the memory was stored by listing all memories
Clean up outdated or incorrect memories

memories.text: Community organizer stored memory about constituency issue

user_agent_config.personality: Community-focused and organized. Values remembering details about constituents and issues to provide better service. Prefers practical, action-oriented interactions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands community organizing and constituent relations but does not know technical tool names or internal memory system APIs.

end_condition: The user has successfully searched for relevant memories, added new important information about a community issue or constituent preference, verified storage, and cleaned up any outdated memories as needed.
